seoDescription: Best Chance HVAC — owner-operated heating and cooling for Sonoma and Marin County homes and businesses. Heat-pump specialists, licensed CSLB #1107468, 24-hour emergency service.
heroHeading: 15+ years of HVAC experience, now local and owner-operated
heroSubheading: Owner-operator Chance Rosado brings over 15 years of hands-on HVAC experience to homes and businesses across Sonoma and Marin Counties.
aboutBody: Best Chance HVAC is owned and operated by Chance Rosado, who brings over 15 years of hands-on industry experience to every job. After more than a decade in the trade, Chance started his own company to deliver the quality service and reliable systems homeowners deserve year-round.

Based in Santa Rosa, the company is locally owned and operated, serving residential and commercial customers throughout Sonoma County and into Marin. Best Chance specializes in high-efficiency heat-pump systems and energy-efficient installations suited to the region's climate.
The team is fully licensed and insured (CSLB #1107468), with a reputation built on responsive, honest, and competitively priced work.

services.title: AC Installation
services.description: Efficient installation of central air conditioning and cooling systems for homes and businesses.

services.title: Ductless Mini-Splits
services.description: Zone-specific cooling and heating without the need for extensive ductwork.

services.title: Heat Pumps
services.description: High-efficiency systems that provide both cooling and heating — a company specialty.

services.title: Heating & Furnaces
services.description: Furnace and heating system installation, repair, and replacement for winter comfort.

services.title: Maintenance
services.description: Proactive maintenance to maximize efficiency, prevent breakdowns, and extend system life.

services.title: 24-Hour Emergency Service
services.description: Around-the-clock emergency HVAC service available (emergency fee applies).

testimonials.quote: Very knowledgeable. They fixed the problem quickly at reasonable rates — one of the best HVAC people I have ever worked with.
testimonials.author: HomeAdvisor reviewer

testimonials.quote: Our furnace replacement went above expectations. The technician explained everything and showed me how the system worked. I would recommend them to family and friends.
testimonials.author: HomeAdvisor reviewer

testimonials.quote: Chance is extremely responsive and trustworthy, and very experienced. He is the best there is.
testimonials.author: Google reviewer
